Practice Areas

Estate & Transfer Tax Counsel

Sophisticated planning for high-net-worth families. Every engagement starts with a confidential review of your balance sheet, your beneficiaries, and your intentions across generations.

Estate Tax Returns — Form 706

Federal estate tax preparation with portability elections, alternate valuation, and qualified disclaimers. We coordinate appraisals, defend valuation positions, and structure deferrals under IRC 6166 where appropriate.

Gift Tax Returns — Form 709

Annual exclusion planning, lifetime exemption tracking, and strategic gifting strategies to reduce taxable estates.

Dynasty Trust Drafting

Multi-generational trusts designed for asset protection, GST exemption allocation, and decades of compounding growth.

Generation-Skipping Tax

GST exemption allocation, inclusion ratio analysis, and reverse-QTIP elections to minimize transfer tax across grandchildren and beyond.

Charitable Remainder Trusts

CRTs, CRATs, and CLATs structured for income tax deduction, capital gains deferral, and lasting philanthropic impact.

Family Limited Partnerships

FLP and FLLC formation with valuation discounts, governance documents, and defensible Section 2036 positioning.

By the Numbers

Quiet Results, Across Decades

Our work is private by design. The numbers speak to the consistency of the practice.

Years of practice
About the Firm

Considered.
Confidential.
Continuous.

Whitfield Estate Counsel is a boutique tax practice focused exclusively on estate, gift, and generation-skipping transfer tax. We do not handle litigation, divorce, or transactional work — only the long arc of preserving wealth across generations.

Each engagement begins with a private review of your assets, your beneficiaries, and your values. We then build a coordinated plan with your wealth advisor, CPA, and trustees — and we stay engaged for the life of the structure.

JDLLM TaxationACTEC FellowState Bar

Star Avvo rating from peers and clients
Engagement

A Considered Process

Three phases. No surprises. Discretion at every step.

1

Confidential Discovery

A private conversation to understand your balance sheet, your family, and the legacy you intend to leave behind.

2

Strategy & Drafting

We design the trust structures, gifting cadence, and exemption allocations — coordinated with your advisors.

3

Stewardship

Annual reviews, Form 709 filings, valuation updates, and adjustments as the law and your family evolve.

Client Voices

Trusted Across Generations

“
Our family business spans three generations and four states. They built the dynasty trust and FLP structure that lets us pass equity to our children without triggering estate tax. Calm, deliberate counsel.
Multi-Generational Family Business
Dynasty Trust & FLP
“
As a retired physician couple, we needed someone who understood both retirement assets and estate planning. They coordinated with our financial advisor and structured everything to honor our wishes for our grandchildren.
Retired Physician Couple
Generation-Skipping Plan
“
I wanted to fund a charitable remainder trust without sacrificing my retirement income. They built a CRUT that gave me an immediate tax deduction, lifetime income, and a meaningful gift to the museum I love.
Philanthropist
Charitable Remainder Trust
